briefing: Markets are moderately risk-on with NASDAQ +1.4% and S&P 500 +0.7%, meeting the threshold for capital deployment per the strategy cadence. With $677 cash and 4 open slots, the strategy calls for filling at least one position on the first genuine risk-on signal after holding through prior neutral days. AXTI earns the high-conviction buy as the strongest multi-signal setup with the lowest RSI (56.4) among the top-scored candidates — giving it the most room to run before reaching overbought territory. All six existing positions are held; no stop-loss or profit-target triggers are visible at current prices.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Multi-signal confirmation means requiring several independent technical indicators to agree before entering a trade — for example, MACD crossover AND RSI in bullish range AND price above the 20-day moving average all firing together. Each signal alone can produce false positives; when all four align, it suggests institutional buying rather than a random intraday spike. Today's AXTI buy meets all four criteria, which is why it earns high conviction over higher-RSI alternatives like SOFI (68.9) or BFLY (67.8) that have less upside room.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 多重信號確認，是指在入市前要求多個獨立技術指標同時發出買入訊號，例如MACD黃金交叉、RSI處於強勢區間、股價站上20日均線，四項條件缺一不可。單一信號容易出現假突破；當所有信號齊聚時，往往代表有機構資金積極買入，而非單純的日內隨機波動。今日買入AXTI正符合全部四項條件，這也是它獲得高信心評級的原因，優於RSI已偏高的SOFI（68.9）或BFLY（67.8）等候選股，後者上升空間相對有限。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities advanced on July 6 with the NASDAQ leading at +1.4%, driven by continued strength in technology and semiconductor names amid resilient macroeconomic conditions. The S&P 500 added +0.7%, reflecting broad market participation beyond mega-cap stocks. Risk appetite remained elevated as investors rotated into momentum names ahead of the upcoming earnings season, with semiconductors and AI-adjacent stocks drawing the most institutional interest.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市於7月6日上揚，那斯達克指數領漲1.4%，在穩健宏觀經濟數據的支撐下，科技及半導體板塊持續強勢。標普500指數上漲0.7%，顯示市場漲幅已擴散至大型股以外的更廣泛領域。隨著財報季臨近，風險偏好維持高位，資金積極輪動至動能股，半導體及人工智能相關個股吸引最多機構資金關注。

trades.reasoning: All four confirmation signals align — MACD crossover, RSI 56.4 (lowest among score-95 candidates, maximum runway before overbought), price above SMA-20, rising histogram — on a risk-on day with cash above the $500 deployment threshold.
